seoTitle: Wickham vs Willowra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wickham and Willowra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wickham and Willowra.
heading: Wickham vs Willowra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wickham, Northern Territory and Willowra, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wickham has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Willowra (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wickham or Willowra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wickham has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Willowra scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wickham scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Willowra scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wickham or Willowra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wickham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
